title: The Rajiv Gandhi University Act, 2006
full_text: The Rajiv Gandhi University Act, 2006 राजीव गांधी विश्‍वविद्यालयअधिनियम, 2006 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200708 Act Number: 08 Enactment Date: 2007-01-10 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The Rajiv Gandhi University Act, 2006 Hindi Title: राजीव गांधी विश्‍वविद्यालयअधिनियम, 2006 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching and affiliating University in the State of Arunachal Pradesh and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 01-04-2007 Notification: 1st April, 2007, vide notification No. S.O. 512(E), dated 1st April, 2007, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Rajiv Gandhi University Act, 2006 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of the University. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Effect of establishment of the University. Section 5. Objects of the University. Section 6. Powers of the University. Section 7. Jurisdictions. Section 8. University open to all classes, castes and creed. Section 9. The Visitor. Section 10. The Chief Rector. Section 11. Officers of the University. Section 12. The Chancellor. Section 13. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 14. The Pro-Vice-Chancellor. Section 15. The Deans of Faculties. Section 16. The Registrar. Section 17. The Finance Officer. Section 18. The Controller of Examinations. Section 19. The Librarian. Section 20. Other officers. Section 21. Authorities of the University. Section 22. The Court. Section 23. The Executive Council. Section 24. The Academic Council. Section 25. The College Development Council. Section 26. The Board of Studies. Section 27. The Finance Committee. Section 28. Other authorities of the University. Section 29. Power to make Statutes. Section 30. Statutes how to be made. Show Related Subordinates Section 31. Power to make Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 32. Regulations. Section 33. Annual report. Section 34. Annual accounts. Section 35. Returns and information. Section 36. Conditions of service of employees. Section 37. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 38. Right to appeal. Section 39. Provident and pension funds. Section 40. Disputes as to constitution of authorities and bodies. Section 41. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 42. Proceedings of authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 43. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 44. Mode of proof of University record. Section 45. Power to remove difficulties. Section 46. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Section 47. Transitional provisions. Section 48. Repeal of Arunachal Pradesh Act 1 of 1984. Section 49. Amendment of Act 24 of 1973. Schedule 1.
